title: AboutResponseV1
description: Schema for AboutResponseV1 in Nuix REST API

server.description: The URL of the server as configured by the publicURL property.

engineVersion.description: The version of the Nuix engine the service is running.

startupTime.description: The startup time of the server in milliseconds.

serverId.description: The server ID as configured by the serverId property.

licenceSource.description: The license source.  Note this is always server.

userManagementUrl.description: Unused and deprecated.  Always empty string.

textHighlightingEnabled.description: Unused and deprecated.  Return value as configured based on the textHighlightingEnabled property.

phraseHighlightingEnabled.description: Unused and deprecated.  Return value as configured based on the phraseHighlightingEnabled property.
